claims.description: Defines runtime support, enablement, contract visibility, UIX dependency, and certification claimability for HTTP/1.1, HTTP/2, HTTP/3, and QUIC.
claims.title: Transport posture and claimability

claims.description: Defines admin and public disclosure rules for JSON Schema, JWS, JWE, JWT, and JWKS-adjacent artifacts without exposing secret-bearing or private material.
claims.title: UIX safe disclosure boundaries

claims.description: Defines required artifacts, generated projections, release-gate obligations, and disclosure paths for SSDF, SLSA, in-toto, Sigstore, SPDX, and CycloneDX.
claims.title: Release provenance and artifact obligations

features.description: Transport posture feature: define and govern support and applicability semantics for RFC 9112 HTTP/1.1 across runtime, admin API, public API, admin UIX, and public UIX. Current implementation status: absent. Governed by SPEC-1080.

lifecycle.note: Implemented by the transport disclosure and provenance closure slice.
